spec_match.rationale: Applies all four font-variant-emoji values across headlines, body, and a UI button row — broad coverage of where the property changes rendering.

interactive.rationale: Live-edit input + simultaneous four-variant preview grid + UI button toggling — strong interactive surface.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises headlines + body + UI buttons + four-variant preview from a typed string. Page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show emoji-in-text alignment subtleties (line-height interactions when colour emoji ascender differs from text glyph ascender). Doesn't show how non-emoji codepoints in the string are unaffected.

references.rationale: No chromestatus.com link in see-also. CLAUDE.md rule #3 regression.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, --accent-* used consistently, no static-card.

openQuestions.title: Show line-height / vertical alignment impact
openQuestions.detail: Colour emoji glyphs typically have a different ascender/descender than the surrounding text font. Add a paragraph with a fixed line-height where the variant flip causes visible vertical-alignment drift — a real-world concern.

openQuestions.title: Persist user input across variant toggles
openQuestions.detail: If the visitor edits the test string, the four-variant preview should update without needing a separate refresh. Confirm the live-update is wired and add a 'reset to default' button.

summary: Broad, rich preview surface that covers headline/body/button contexts. Missing the chromestatus reference link and never surfaces the line-height edge case that bites real layouts.
